purpose: Catalog complete third-party workflow packages without flattening their internal skills into this repository's shared-skill taxonomy or sync indexes.
rules: A workflow package remains a complete upstream-owned repository; do not copy its child skills into skills/ merely for cataloging.
Do not add workflow-package child skills to skills-lock.json, by-name.md, by-domain.md, or the shared-skill sync flow.
Pin an immutable upstream commit and review the upstream diff before synchronizing an organization fork.
Keep organization-specific policy in a separate overlay repository or documented install configuration; do not silently modify the upstream package.

organizationFork.relationship: GitHub fork preserving the upstream repository structure and history

packageContract.integrityRule: Install and update this repository as a complete package; never recategorize its child skills in this Skill-hub.

installation.postInstall: Run /setup-matt-pocock-skills once in each target project before using the engineering workflow.
installation.verificationStatus: Verified on 2026-07-24 with `npx --yes skills@latest add Singularity-AI-Gamer/skills --list`: the organization fork was cloned and 41 skills were discovered. No skill was installed during the verification.

steps: Compare the organization fork against the pinned upstream commit.
Review license, package-level documentation, scripts, plugin metadata, and runtime compatibility.
Synchronize the fork only after review, then update pinnedCommit in this catalog.
Do not run the Skill-hub shared-skill sync scripts against this package.

packages.notes: This is a workflow package, not a collection of Skill-hub-owned atomic skills.
